Weakness → Feed Pipeline: IngestFromSession + GetTopWeaknesses + ReelsFeedRanking

Semantic Color Component System (Badge + Progress + Level)

hyperedges.label: LiveKit Egress → Transcription → Pronunciation Assessment → CQS Pipeline
Mobile Quota Check → TutorConnect → LiveCall flow
Tutor Turn Pronunciation Capture: Layers A+B+C+D
Quota Enforcement: resolveQuota + LiveKit Token + Call-End Deduction
Weakness → Feed Pipeline: IngestFromSession + GetTopWeaknesses + ReelsFeedRanking
Hinglish AI Tutor Pipeline (STT + Gemini + TTS)
Semantic Color Component System (Badge + Progress + Level)
